info.description:
**ServeRest is a free REST API that simulates a virtual store to serve as study material for API testing.**

**Don't forget to follow the [project author](https://github.com/PauloGoncalvesBH) and star the repository: [github.com/ServeRest/ServeRest](https://github.com/ServeRest/ServeRest)**

This page documents all routes and how to access them. For more details about ServeRest (how to run locally using Docker or NPM, change authentication timeout, etc), see [the ServeRest repository](https://github.com/serverest/serverest).

Using Postman? Import the [Swagger JSON](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ServeRest/ServeRest/trunk/docs/swagger.json) to access the collections.

Doing load testing? Read the '[Load Testing](https://github.com/ServeRest/ServeRest#teste-de-carga)' section.


Thank you ♥ to everyone who supports the project [financially](https://opencollective.com/serverest#section-contributors) or [with code, ideas, and promotion](https://github.com/ServeRest/ServeRest#contribuidores-); thanks to you **more than R$ 2000,00 were donated to the NGO [Todas as letras](https://todasasletras.org/)** so far.

ServeRest has a front-end in beta; check it out: [front.serverest.dev](https://front.serverest.dev).

Need help? [Open an issue](https://github.com/ServeRest/ServeRest/issues) or contact the project maintainer:
info.title: ServeRest

tags.name: Login
tags.description: Authenticate your user to create a cart and, if you are an admin, manage products

tags.name: Usuários
tags.description: Manage users, check login data, and create admin users

tags.name: Produtos
tags.description: Browse registered products or, as an admin, manage store products

tags.name: Carrinhos
tags.description: Browse registered carts, create one for your user, and, in the end, give up the purchase because you were just looking around

post.description: The token returned in authorization lasts 600 seconds (10 minutes). If it is expired you will receive status code 401 (Unauthorized).
It is not allowed to register a user with an email already in use

delete.description: It is not allowed to delete a user with a cart.

200.description: Record deleted successfully | No record deleted

message.example: Registro excluído com sucesso | Nenhum registro excluído

put.description:
It is not allowed to register a user with an email already in use.
If no user is found with the given ID, a new record is created instead of an update.

post.description: It is not allowed to register a product with a name already in use

delete.description: It is not allowed to delete a product that is part of a cart.

200.description: Record deleted successfully | No record deleted

message.example: Registro excluído com sucesso | Nenhum registro excluído

400.description: Product is part of a cart

put.description:
It is not allowed to register a product with a name already in use.
If no product is found with the given ID, a new record is created instead of an update.

get.description: Returned carts are unique per user

post.description:
The cart is linked to the user from the token sent in the `Authorization` header, and only 1 cart per user is allowed.
When a cart is created successfully, the quantity of each product in the cart is reduced from the stock.

message.example: Não é permitido possuir produto duplicado | Não é permitido ter mais de 1 carrinho | Produto não encontrado | Produto não possui quantidade suficiente

delete.description:
When a purchase is completed, the cart is deleted.
The deleted cart will be the one linked to the user from the `token` used.

200.description: Record deleted successfully | No cart was found for this user

message.example: Registro excluído com sucesso | Não foi encontrado carrinho para esse usuário

delete.summary: Delete cart and return products to stock
delete.description:
When a purchase is canceled, the cart is deleted and the stock of the products in that cart is replenished.
The deleted cart will be the one linked to the user from the `token` used.

200.description: Record deleted successfully | No cart was found for this user

message.example: Registro excluído com sucesso | Não foi encontrado carrinho para esse usuário

preco.name: preco
preco.description: Filter by price. Provide an integer greater than or equal to 1.

quantidade.name: quantidade
quantidade.description: Filter by quantity. Provide an integer greater than or equal to 0.

precoTotal.name: precoTotal
precoTotal.description: Filter by total price. Provide an integer greater than or equal to 1.

quantidadeTotal.name: quantidadeTotal
quantidadeTotal.description: Filter by total quantity. Provide an integer greater than or equal to 0.

ProdutoNomeDuplicado.description: A product with this name already exists

ApiKeyAuth.name: Authorization
ApiKeyAuth.description: Provide the `Authorization` value returned by the _/login_ route

message.example: Este email já está sendo usado
Não é permitido excluir usuário com carrinho cadastrado
Não é permitido excluir produto que faz parte de carrinho
Já existe produto com esse nome
Token de acesso ausente, inválido, expirado ou usuário do token não existe mais
